India.source: yfinance; IN rates=None (no keyless yfinance G-sec/policy source); regime=NEUTRAL (no IN rate series to derive trend)

evidence.rule: entry=next open, stop=2xATR, target=nearest resistance (fallback 4xATR), time-stop=20d; costs US 10.0bps / India 35.0bps
evidence.caveats: Backtested on TODAY's universe (survivorship bias) — treat returns as an upper bound, not a forward expectation. Perfect stop fills assumed. The forward Alpaca paper ledger is the unbiased test. Not financial advice.
